projectDescription: A React-based interactive tool for visualizing Network Flux graphs and computing maximum flow using the Ford-Fulkerson algorithm with step-by-step animation.
keyFeatures: Interactive network flux graph visualization using React Flow
Step-by-step algorithm walkthrough with forward/backward navigation
JSON-based adjacency matrix input for graph definition
Visual indication of source (s) and sink (t) nodes with custom icons
Bidirectional edge rendering with bezier curve offset
Real-time max flow validation against expected value
publicApiSurface: generateNodesAndEdges(data, maxFlowExpected, maxFlowInitialFlux?) → { nodes, edges, graphWidth, maxFlow }
fordFulkerson(graph, s, t, V, stepStop) → { maxFlow, rGraph, finished }
breadthFirstSearch(rGraph, s, t, parent, V) → boolean
getSpecialPath({ sourceX, sourceY, targetX, targetY }, offset) → string
